title: Zensar Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Zensar Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Zensar Technologies:
Zensar Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies!
